name: Alan Carter
background: Dr. Carter has over 30 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He was a co-founder of Peregrine Diamonds Ltd. and Magellan Minerals Ltd. He previously worked for Rio Tinto and BHP Billiton.

commpanies.name: Cabral Gold Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director
